org.arakhne.neteditor.io.xml

Class AbstractXMLWriter

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.AbstractNetEditorWriter
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.io.xml.AbstractXMLWriter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    NetEditorWriter, XMLConstants
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    GraphMLWriter, GXLWriter

    public abstract class AbstractXMLWriter
extends AbstractNetEditorWriter
implements XMLConstants
    This class provides XML utilities for writers.
    Since:
    16.0
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:04
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-io

      • Fields inherited from interface org.arakhne.neteditor.io.xml.XMLConstants

        A_NAME, A_XLINK_HREF, N_ATTR, N_BAG, N_BOOL, N_ENUM, N_FLOAT, N_INT, N_LOCATOR, N_SEQ, N_SET, N_STRING, SCHEMA_URL

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected static boolean append(Node parent, Node child)
      Add the given child into the given parent if the child is not empty.
      protected Element createAttribute(String name, Object value)
      Create the XML node for an attribute.
      protected Element createAttributeValue(Object jvalue)
      Create the XML node for an value.
      protected Element createElement(String tagName)
      Create an XML element with the given name.
      protected abstract Element createGraphDOM(Map<UUID,? extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> graphs, Collection<? extends Figure> figures, Progression progression)
      Create the DOM of the content.
      protected Text createTextNode(String data)
      Create an XML text node with the given data.
      protected Document document()
      Replies the document under construction.
      protected static void extractNoModelObjectViews(Collection<? extends Figure> figures, Map<UUID,List<ViewComponent>> viewObjects, Map<Figure,Integer> outputFigures, Progression progression)
      Extract the views that are not related to model objects.
      protected static void extractViews(ModelObject object, Map<UUID,List<ViewComponent>> viewObjects, Map<Figure,Integer> outputFigures, Progression progression)
      Extract the views of the model object.
      protected abstract URL getPublicDTD()
      Replies the description of the PUBLIC DTD.
      protected abstract URL getSystemDTD()
      Replies the URL of the SYSTEM DTD.
      protected static boolean isEmpty(Node node)
      Replies if the given node is empty, no child nor attribute.
      void write(OutputStream os, Collection<? extends Figure> figures)
      Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, and the view objects stored in the given container.
      void write(OutputStream os, Graph<?,?,?,?> graph)
      Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, but not the view objects.
      <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> 
      void      		 write(OutputStream os, G graph, ViewComponentContainer<?,G> container)
      Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, and the view objects stored in the given container.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractXMLWriter

        protected AbstractXMLWriter()

    • Method Detail

      • append

        protected static boolean append(Node parent,
             Node child)
        Add the given child into the given parent if the child is not empty.
        Parameters:
        parent -
        child -
        Returns:
        true if the child is added, false if the child is not added.

      • isEmpty

        protected static boolean isEmpty(Node node)
        Replies if the given node is empty, no child nor attribute.
        Parameters:
        node -
        Returns:
        true if the node is empty or null, false if the child contains one attribute or one child.

      • extractNoModelObjectViews

        protected static void extractNoModelObjectViews(Collection<? extends Figure> figures,
                             Map<UUID,List<ViewComponent>> viewObjects,
                             Map<Figure,Integer> outputFigures,
                             Progression progression)
        Extract the views that are not related to model objects.
        Parameters:
        figures - are the views to parse
        viewObjects - is the map inside which the views are put.
        outputFigures - are the figures to output. It must be filled with the figures to output
        progression - is the task progression.

      • extractViews

        protected static void extractViews(ModelObject object,
                Map<UUID,List<ViewComponent>> viewObjects,
                Map<Figure,Integer> outputFigures,
                Progression progression)
        Extract the views of the model object.
        Parameters:
        object - is the object from which the views are extracted.
        viewObjects - is the map inside which the views are put.
        outputFigures - are the figures to output. It must be filled with the figures to output
        progression - is the task progression.

      • document

        protected final Document document()
        Replies the document under construction.
        Returns:
        the document under construction.

      • createElement

        protected final Element createElement(String tagName)
        Create an XML element with the given name. This function invokes document().Document.createDocumentFragment().
        Parameters:
        tagName -
        Returns:
        the XML element.

      • createTextNode

        protected final Text createTextNode(String data)
        Create an XML text node with the given data. This function invokes document().Document.createTextNode(String).
        Parameters:
        data -
        Returns:
        the XML text node.

      • createGraphDOM

        protected abstract Element createGraphDOM(Map<UUID,? extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> graphs,
                     Collection<? extends Figure> figures,
                     Progression progression)
                                   throws IOException
        Create the DOM of the content.
        Parameters:
        graphs - are the graphs to output.
        figures - are the figures to output. The list is ordered from the front layer to the background layer.
        progression - is the task progression.
        Returns:
        the DOM element.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • getSystemDTD

        protected abstract URL getSystemDTD()
        Replies the URL of the SYSTEM DTD.
        Returns:
        the URL.

      • getPublicDTD

        protected abstract URL getPublicDTD()
        Replies the description of the PUBLIC DTD.
        Returns:
        the public DTD.

      • write

        public final void write(OutputStream os,
         Graph<?,?,?,?> graph)
                 throws IOException
        Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, but not the view objects.
        Specified by:
        write in interface NetEditorWriter
        Parameters:
        os - is the stream to write in.
        graph - is the graph to export in the stream.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • write

        public final <G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>> void write(OutputStream os,
                                    G graph,
                                    ViewComponentContainer<?,G> container)
                 throws IOException
        Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, and the view objects stored in the given container.
        Specified by:
        write in interface NetEditorWriter
        Parameters:
        os - is the stream to write in.
        graph - is the graph to export in the stream.
        container - is the figure container from which figures may be extracted.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • write

        public final void write(OutputStream os,
         Collection<? extends Figure> figures)
                 throws IOException
        Write the graph representation of the specified graph into the specified stream, and the view objects stored in the given container.
        Specified by:
        write in interface NetEditorWriter
        Parameters:
        os - is the stream to write in.
        figures - are the figures to output, and linked to the graph to output. The list is sorted from the front layer to the background layer.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • createAttribute

        protected final Element createAttribute(String name,
                      Object value)
                                 throws IOException
        Create the XML node for an attribute.
        Parameters:
        name -
        value -
        Returns:
        the XML node.
        Throws:
        IOException

      • createAttributeValue

        protected final Element createAttributeValue(Object jvalue)
                                      throws IOException
        Create the XML node for an value.
        Parameters:
        jvalue - the java value to put in the XML.
        Returns:
        the XML node.
        Throws:
        IOException
